title: MikroTik SFP/SFP+/SFP28 optical module XS+31LC10D, SM, 10km, 1/10/25G, 1310nm
description: XS+31LC10D is a singlemode SFP / SFP+ / SFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 25 Gbps , supporting lower speeds of 1 Gbps and 10 Gbps with, wavelength of 1310nm and two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 10km . The module is compatible with MikroTik devices and also with devices of other manufacturers "cisco compatibile". The perfect choice, for example is MikroTik devices CCR2004-1G-12S+2XS The high MTBF value, which is 200,000 hours at 25° C, ensures a very long life of the module
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP, SFP+, SFP28 For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 1 Gbps, 10 Gbps, 25 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 Distance [km] 10 Transfer type 2-fiber Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC General Compatibility Universal
